title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a built-in model registry and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate embeddings, pull/manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, retrieval, tool-calling, etc.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Feature-rich self-hosted WebUI for Ollama with chat history, RAG, multi-user auth and plugin system.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, custom timeouts.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; concise DSL for chat, generate and model management.

title: ollama-cli (rust)
summary: Rust crate providing typed async client plus standalone CLI for Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions and chat copilot.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight Next.js chat UI that streams answers from any Ollama model.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app to manage and chat with Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server in Docker or Kubernetes.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama endpoints via Django REST framework with admin UI.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component that streams Ollama responses and supports session memory.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes and insert generated text.
